name: axto-dev
description: AXTO — AI Execution & Tools Orchestration Platform · axto.dev

scripts.deploy:web: pnpm --filter web build && pnpm wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name axto-web
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm wrangler d1 migrations apply axto-db --config apps/api/wrangler.toml --remote
scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm wrangler d1 migrations apply axto-db --config apps/api/wrangler.toml --local
scripts.db:seed: pnpm wrangler d1 execute axto-db --file packages/database/seeds/seed.sql --config apps/api/wrangler.toml --remote
scripts.db:studio: pnpm wrangler d1 execute axto-db --command 'SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\'table\'' --local
